name: Lychee Sherbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and seed the lychees.
2. Squeeze the lychees through two thicknesses of cheesecloth to obtain 1 cup juice.
3. Sprinkle gelatin over cold water and let stand for 5 minutes.
4. Scald milk, add soaked gelatin, and stir until thoroughly dissolved.
5. Add sugar and mix well.
6. Cool the mixture.
7. Add milk and half and half. Stir in lychee juice and lemon juice.
8. Freeze in an ice cream freezer.
